website.label: Website
website.summary: The static YouNew website is available. This status is based on a verified build snapshot, not continuous uptime monitoring.

content.label: Published content
content.summary: The canonical content snapshot used by the web experience is current as of 18 July 2026.

ios.label: iOS public distribution
ios.summary: Public App Store or TestFlight availability has not been confirmed. Version 1.1 (build 5) is the latest locally verified application build.

limitations: Public App Store and TestFlight availability has not been confirmed.
This page is a static snapshot and does not provide live uptime monitoring.
Saved web items are stored on the current device and do not yet sync with the iOS application.
Some application-only capabilities are not available in the web experience.
